title: Sara runs the bottle to Mama
prompt: Mid-shot at the @beach-blanket setup — striped beach blanket on the dry sand with a sun umbrella, picnic cooler, and a magazine. @Mama already seated cross-legged on the blanket reading a magazine, sun hat on. @Sara already standing in front of her, breathless from running, ponytail tousled, holding the glowing @magic-bottle out in both hands toward Mama. Sara (out of breath, eyes shining): "MOMMY! LOOK at this — it just WASHED UP!" Mama (lowering her magazine, eyebrows raising as she sees the glow): "Sweet pea, what is THAT?" Sara (vibrating with energy, holding the bottle even higher): "It's GINGER! GINGER from the magic forest! She wrote us a note!"
